benchmarks.name: binary_search
benchmarks.hypothesis: Branch-heavy search should reward stronger branch-oriented code generation

benchmarks.name: switch_dispatch
benchmarks.description: Dense switch dispatch over generated 6-bit values
benchmarks.hypothesis: Dense dispatch should reflect jump-table or compare-ladder lowering quality

benchmarks.name: branch_dense
benchmarks.description: High-density conditional branch mesh over generated u32 inputs
benchmarks.hypothesis: Many short conditional paths should magnify branch lowering and layout quality

benchmarks.name: bpf_call_chain
benchmarks.description: Chain of 3 __noinline BPF-to-BPF subprogram calls per loop iteration
benchmarks.hypothesis: Subprogram call overhead should differ between kernel callee-saved convention and LLVM direct calls
